blocked_claims: This record does not assert that any Critical risk control is non-bypassable in production.
This record does not open runtime writes, real data, M365 Graph writes, AI write-back, Obsidian sync, portal runtime, or HR runtime.
This record does not count the user review waiver as a valid Claude review receipt.
This record does not synthesize Launch owner or G3 approver acceptance.
